Notes: Rensselaer uses big second half to pull away from the visiting Hawks.  Junior
Kristin Kaczynski led all scorers with 22 points.  Three other RPI players
reached double digits in scoring, including Lansingburgh grad Kelly Choppy.
RPI back in action Saturday when they host Mt. St. Mary at 2pm.
